description_long: This helmet is a robust, industrial-style headgear constructed primarily from dark, matte-finished metal panels, joined with visible rivets and seams. The front features a large circular breathing apparatus, two flexible ribbed hoses extending from the lower sides, and a set of optical devices including a round lens and a cylindrical scope mounted above the right eye. The left side displays a prominent round port and a thick cable running along the surface, while the rear is smooth with additional rivets and a cylindrical attachment. The helmet's surface is weathered, showing scuffs and minor scratches, suggesting heavy use or exposure to harsh environments. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative graphics, emphasizing function over form. The interior is likely padded for comfort and fit, though not visible from the exterior.
description: A rugged, metallic helmet with ribbed hoses, optical devices, and a matte, weathered finish, designed for protection and utility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the breathing apparatus, ribbed hoses, and optical devices prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the round port, thick cable, and the attachment of the hose.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, riveted back panel and the continuation of the hoses.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the cylindrical attachment and the cable running along the helmet.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: One large circular vent at the front center, no other visible ventilation openings.
